commands: echo '   Direct MySQL query to RDS MariaDB     '
echo '--- Using bench to query RDS via Frappe DB layer ---'
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "[\"SELECT @@hostname, @@version\"]"
echo '--- Table count in RDS erpnext schema ---'
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "[\"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='erpnext'\"]"
echo '--- Host-level MySQL client to RDS ---'

mysql -h erpnext-poc-erpnextdb-ooorv168mrw1.c2diyosis802.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com -u erpnext -pAtlasLakesAws123! erpnext -e "SELECT @@hostname AS rds_host, @@version AS mariadb_version; SELECT COUNT(*) AS erpnext_tables FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='erpnext';" 2>&1 || echo 'mysql client not installed on host'

docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 python3 -c "import redis; r=redis.Redis(host='erp-er-1lbcebhw7tt8c.dj78vm.0001.use1.cache.amazonaws.com',port=6379); info=r.info(); print('PING:', r.ping()); print('Redis version:', info['redis_version']); print('Connected clients:', info['connected_clients'])" 2>&1 || echo 'redis module not available - but ESTAB connections above prove connectivity'

docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 python3 -c "import redis; r=redis.Redis(host='erp-er-p9gezja7h2j8.dj78vm.0001.use1.cache.amazonaws.com',port=6379); print('PING:', r.ping())" 2>&1 || echo 'redis module not available'
echo '--- Host-level: show ALL established connections to ElastiCache and RDS ---'
